scripts.deploy:dev: pnpm build && bash -c 'rm -rf node_modules/.cache/wrangler && source ~/.cloudflare-school-site.env && CI=true npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name postfromprovence-dev --branch=main --commit-dirty=true'
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm build && bash -c 'rm -rf node_modules/.cache/wrangler && source ~/.cloudflare-school-site.env && CI=true npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name postfromprovence --branch=main --commit-dirty=true'
